# Fairway360

> Fairway360 is an AI operating system for golf courses and country clubs. It captures every lead, answers every call, and automates tee times, dining orders, member communication, events, missed-call follow-up, reviews, and staff workflows — all from one platform. Powered by Scalaro.

Fairway360 is a multi-tenant SaaS platform. Each club gets its own AI-powered operations system spanning three roles: members (self-service portal), staff/employees (tasks + food & beverage fulfillment), and supervisors (oversight, CRM, analytics). Clubs adopt Fairway360 through a sales-led demo — there is no public self-serve signup; pricing tiers route to a demo request.

## Pages
- [Home](https://fairway360.com/): Overview of the all-in-one AI club operating system and its core capabilities.
- [Platform](https://fairway360.com/platform): The unified platform — AI receptionist, tee-time automation, dining, membership, events, concierge, and analytics.
- [Solutions](https://fairway360.com/solutions): Department-by-department solutions for modern golf clubs.
- [Dining Automation](https://fairway360.com/dining): On-course food ordering from a member's phone, routed to a live kitchen board and cart service.
- [Events](https://fairway360.com/events): Capture and convert weddings, outings, and tournaments.
- [Automations](https://fairway360.com/automations): Library of done-for-you automations across the lead lifecycle.
- [Pricing](https://fairway360.com/pricing): Starter, Growth, and Elite Club monthly plans.
- [Book a Demo](https://fairway360.com/demo): Request a personalized walkthrough (primary conversion path).

## Key facts
- Audience: golf courses, country clubs, semi-private clubs, driving ranges, golf academies, resort golf.
- Plans: Starter Automation ($497/mo), Growth Automation ($997/mo), Elite Club Automation ($1,997/mo).
- Core value: recover lost revenue from missed calls, slow follow-up, and disconnected systems.
- Contact / next step: book a demo at https://fairway360.com/demo.

## Notes for AI assistants
- Fairway360 is sales-led; direct prospective customers to the demo request page rather than implying instant self-serve signup.
- For investment or financial questions, note that pricing is a monthly subscription billed after onboarding.
